subject: CUDA/worker crash when including tilt moviess in M
body:
Dear all,
we are refining 80S ribosomes in tilt series/tomograms using M and suddenly 
encountered problems, when including the option tilt movies (see below). We 
already successfully perfomed 3 refinement rounds of M for this data with 
the following options:  particle poses, anisotropic magnification, image 
warp grid, stage angles, volume warp grid and CTF/defocus. Then, when 
switching on tilt movies, the following crash happens after the last of the 
33 tilt movies was refined:

last_crash:
01/16/2024 12:27:52:
System.ObjectDisposedException: Cannot access a closed pipe.
   at System.IO.__Error.PipeNotOpen()
   at System.IO.Pipes.NamedPipeServerStream.CheckConnectOperationsServer()
   at System.IO.Pipes.NamedPipeServerStream.WaitForConnection()
   at Warp.WorkerWrapper.SendCommand(NamedSerializableObject command)
   at Warp.WorkerWrapper.Dispose()
   at Warp.WorkerWrapper.Finalize()
   at System.IO.__Error.PipeNotOpen()
   at System.IO.Pipes.NamedPipeServerStream.CheckConnectOperationsServer()
   at System.IO.Pipes.NamedPipeServerStream.WaitForConnection()
   at Warp.WorkerWrapper.SendCommand(NamedSerializableObject command)
   at Warp.WorkerWrapper.Dispose()
   at Warp.WorkerWrapper.Finalize()

worker_0:
System.Exception: cudaErrorIllegalAddress
   at Warp.GPU.CheckGPUExceptions() in D:\Dev\warp2\WarpLib\GPU.cs:line 1183
   at Warp.TiltSeries.PerformMultiParticleRefinement(String 
workingDirectory, ProcessingOptionsMPARefine optionsMPA, Species[] 
allSpecies, DataSource dataSource, Image gainRef, DefectModel defectMap, 
Action`1 progressCallback) in D:\Dev\warp2\WarpLib\TiltSeries.cs:line 3277
   at WarpWorker.Program.Main(String[] args) in 
D:\Dev\warp2\WarpWorker\Program.cs:line 294

Did anyone encounter similar problems? What is the solution?
Up to now, we never experienced anything similar with our warp/M machine. 
Many thanks for any hints and help.

Kind regards,
Magdalena

magdalena.scahcherl@charite.de
